task_completion.description: Verify the 'Attention Is All You Need' paper is annotated correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero right-hand info pane for 'Attention Is All You Need', the 'Extra' field must contain exactly two lines: 'Citation Count: 130000' and 'Area: NLP'. There must be no commas in the number.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' paper is annotated correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero right-hand info pane for 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition', the 'Extra' field must contain exactly two lines: 'Citation Count: 200000' and 'Area: Computer Vision'. There must be no commas in the number.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' paper is annotated correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero right-hand info pane for 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication', the 'Extra' field must contain exactly two lines: 'Citation Count: 160000' and 'Area: Information Theory'. There must be no commas in the number.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' paper is annotated correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero right-hand info pane for 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence', the 'Extra' field must contain exactly two lines: 'Citation Count: 25000' and 'Area: Artificial Intelligence'. There must be no commas in the number.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Generative Adversarial Nets' paper is annotated correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero right-hand info pane for 'Generative Adversarial Nets', the 'Extra' field must contain exactly two lines: 'Citation Count: 65000' and 'Area: Generative Models'. There must be no commas in the number.

integrity.description: The agent must use the Zotero graphical user interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Zotero application window open and the agent interacting with the item details pane, rather than using a terminal or script to modify the underlying SQLite database.

integrity.description: The agent must place the text specifically in the 'Extra' field.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text must be visible in the 'Extra' field of the Zotero info pane, not in the 'Abstract', 'Tags', or 'Notes' sections.

integrity.description: The agent must not modify any papers other than the five specified.
integrity.visual_evidence: If other papers are visible in the screenshots, their info panes should not show newly added Citation Count or Area annotations.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The citation counts provided in the task description (130000, 200000, 160000, 25000, 65000) are synthetic and intentionally do not match real-world data. The agent MUST use these exact synthetic numbers without commas. The research areas (NLP, Computer Vision, Information Theory, Artificial Intelligence, Generative Models) are accurate and verified.
